programme.sub-title: The Pendulum Swings Both Ways: Part 2

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Making the Cut: Part 1
programme.desc: Sora is psyched to put on a showstopping duel for the fans, but his opponent Shay is set to turn Sora’s one man show into a no man show!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Making the Cut: Part 2
programme.desc: Sora and Shay's heated duel hits its boiling point when dark secrets about their hidden history come to light! Could there be something sinister behind Sora’s sweet-toothed smile?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Sora’s Secrets: Part 1
programme.desc: While Yuto is looking for answers, Sora is looking to get some revenge! But when these two tangle, Yuya finds out more than he ever expected!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Sora’s Secrets: Part 2
programme.desc: Surprises are in the cards as the battle between Sora and Yuto comes to an unexpected conclusion! But just when Yuya thinks he’s seen everything, a new face shows up on the scene that makes Yuya do a triple take!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: A Dark Reflection
programme.desc: Yuya can’t believe his eyes when he finds himself standing face-to-face-to-face with two lookalikes who are out to destroy each other… and everything in sight!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Warped Dimensions
programme.desc: Yuya is in a coma, and nothing has been able to stir him from his terrifying state! Is Yuya down for the count, or will his duelmate’s ESP and TLC make him A-OK?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: A Duel Personality
programme.desc: It’s time for the second round of the Arc League Championship! Yuya is pitted against his polar opposite – a duelist who doesn't duel to entertain, but rather put his foes into pain!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Stealth Warriors
programme.desc: When a mysterious visitor threatens to throw the Championship into chaos, Declan moves in to uncover who they are and soon finds himself facing off against a merciless mercenary!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Bracing for Battle
programme.desc: Declan confronts Celina and shares a story from their past that reveals a frightening future!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Battle Fields
programme.desc: It’s time for a nail biting battle royal in the ARC League Championship! With four battle zones to choose from, the action has never been more mesmerizing or the duels more dangerous!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: While Yuya is looking to knock the competition out cold in the Volcano Zone, the Iceberg Zone is heating up as Zuzu and Gong team up to defrost their foes!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Danger Zones
programme.desc: As the battle royal rumbles on, Yuya finds himself caught in the crossfire when he stumbles across a battle between not-so-noble Knights!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Obelisk Assault
programme.desc: Yuya takes on a terrifying trio from Fusion Dimension who turn their victims into cards!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Dragon's Vengeance
programme.desc: Outnumbered, outmatched, and out of options, will Yuya tap into a deep-seeded darkness to overcome defeat?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Identity Crisis
programme.desc: Zuzu races to stay one step ahead of a cold-blooded hunter who's hot on her heels! Can Zuzu ditch this danger, or will he prove too cunning for her to escape?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Battlefronts
programme.desc: Sparks fly in the Volcano Zone when all our heroes face off against the full fury of Fusion Dimension’s elite Obelisk Force! With more than life points on the line, the action has never been hotter!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Fighting for Fun
programme.desc: Are friends now foes as Yuya and Sora go deck to deck in a fiery face-off?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Dueling Declan
programme.desc: When Yuya discovers Declan's web of lies put his friends in danger, he challenges Declan to a battle as payback!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Kings vs. Dragons
programme.desc: Yuya’s battle with Declan takes a turn for the worse when Declan’s majestic monsters give Yuya the royal treatment!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Parental Guidance: Part 1
programme.desc: "It’s a family feud when Yuya takes on his mom in a duel where there’s more to lose than just his allowance! Can Yuya avoid being run down by Paradise City’s most feared motorcycle momma?"

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Parental Guidance: Part 2
programme.desc: The battle between Yuya and his mom kicks into high gear! Can Yuya avoid being grounded, or will Loco Yoko put the pedal to the metal and throttle her way to victory?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: City 'Scape
programme.desc: As Zuzu and Yugo try to unravel the riddle of Yuya's dimensional doubles, their sleuthing is cut short by Sector Security!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Tops Speed
programme.desc: Zuzu and Yugo redline their Duel Runner in a high-stakes Turbo Duel with Sector Security! Can they outrun the long arm of the law, or will Security put the brakes on their escape?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Synchro Sector
programme.desc: When Yuya and his pals arrive in the Synchro Dimension, Sector Security is waiting for them with open arms… and cuffs! Can Yuya smooth things out before Sylvio and Celina put a wrinkle in his plan?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Super Duelists
programme.desc: It’s a superheroic showdown in the Synchro Dimension pitting Super Gong against his arch-nemesis, Dennis the Destroyer!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Scream for the Green
programme.desc: Dennis and Gong are in for the ride of their lives when they’re introduced to the turbo-charged world of underground motorcycle dueling!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Dueling’s Most Wanted
programme.desc: The battle between Dashin’ Dennis and Sweet Baby Shay hits a speedbump when Sector Security pulls the plug on their Turbo Duel!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Showdown in the Slammer
programme.desc: Yuya learns the ins and outs of The Facility the hard way by coming face-to-face with the toughest and most dangerous duelist in the cell block: the Kingpin!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Hero’s Fall
programme.desc: With his deck on the line, Yuya looks to rock the cell block and KO the Kingpin!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: The Great Escape
programme.desc: Yuya is determined to do the impossible and escape from The Facility, but when friends become foes his plan to break out, breaks down!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Fight for Freedom
programme.desc: When Yuya and his pals try to flee The Facility, their big breakout takes a terrible turn when their escape route leads them straight into the security guards!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Match with the Master
programme.desc: The opening ceremonies of the Friendship Cup kick into overdrive as Yuya squares off against the Master of Faster - Jack Atlas!

programme.title: Chimney and Gombe show Luffy the secret passage that leads to Robin, and Franky puts on a display of raw punching power thanks to a few bottles of cola!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Fukurou's miscalculation! My cola is the water of life!

programme.title: While Franky’s brawl spills into the ocean, Usopp and Sanji attempt to overcome their handcuffs by outsmarting their opponents!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Zoro busts out a new technique! The sword's name is sniper king?

programme.title: Determined not to be defeated by the heinous hair of a devious lion, Chopper risks life and limb by summoning the power of his Rumble Ball for a third time!
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Travel back to ancient Japan for a madcap adventure starring the Straw Hats, some old friends and enemies, and a camel that eats lottery tickets!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Boss luffy returns! Is it a dream or reality? Lottery ruckus!

programme.title: The madcap throwback continues as Luffy and the gang – along with a crowd of characters from the Alabasta arc – competes for a priceless treasure hidden inside a tasty snack!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A big rice cake tossing race at the castle! Red nose's plot!

programme.title: Nami battles a bathing beauty and her lethal bubbles, Chopper unleashes his inner beast, and Luffy inches ever closer to catching up with Robin!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Bubble master kalifa! The soap trap closes in on nami!

programme.title: Franky has a painful encounter with monster Chopper, and Nami gets scrubbed too clean to fight! Meanwhile, Spandam accidentally invokes the deadly Buster Call!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Resounding bad news! Buster call invoked!

programme.title: Zoro uses Usopp as a decoy in his battle with the beasts, and Nami discovers the secret that could be the key to survival in her brawl with the bathing beauty!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Five namis? Nami strikes back with mirages!

programme.title: Franky and Nami come up with a plan to stop Chopper’s rampage, but it could prove deadly to the not-so-little reindeer. Usopp and Zoro are thrilled to finally be free of each other!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Nami's decision! Fire at the out-of-control chopper!

programme.title: Usopp’s ill-advised attempt at bravery threatens to get him killed, but a familiar foot spares the sniper’s life. Luffy struggles to even strike a formidable foe, and Franky races to deliver some very important keys!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Hunter sanji makes an entrance? Elegy for a lying wolf!

programme.title: Luffy's arrival in the New World is marked by violent weather and the discovery of a tiny stowaway. When the Straw Hats agree to help their new friend, it could lead to big trouble with the Marines!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Z’s Ambition! Lily the Little Giant!

programme.title: Nami hatches a plan to save Lily's father, but the arrival of an ex-marine madman throws a monkey wrench into the rescue mission.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Z’s Ambition! A Dark and Powerful Army!

programme.title: Luffy and Zoro find themselves locked in battle with their latest foes, but Nami's knowledge of the sea may be the key to escaping this scrum alive!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Z’s Ambition! A Great and Desperate Escape Plan!

programme.title: Shuzo's squad of manned torpedoes targets the Straw Hats and the giants! The crazed captain tests Luffy's mettle in a showdown on land, but the wily pirate pulls off a supersized surprise in hopes to stomp out the madman for good
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: A desperate cry for help leads the Straw Hats to Punk Hazard, an island engulfed in flames and inhabited by a mythic beast that could make short work of Luffy and the gang!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Arriving! A Burning Island – Punk Hazard!

programme.title: Luffy and Zoro put their strength to the ultimate test in a battle with a dragon. Meanwhile, a band of mysterious intruders make their gassy presence felt aboard the Sunny!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Battle in the Heat! Luffy vs. the Giant Dragon!

programme.title: Luffy gets up close and personal with a torso-less Samurai! Elsewhere, Nami, Sanji, Chopper, and Franky find themselves imprisoned with the pieces of a human face!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Straw Hats Stunned! Enter: A Samurai’s Horrifying Severed Head!

programme.title: Luffy makes friends with a Centaur, Franky uses a cola-powered laser to break out of the clink, and Sanji takes a chance on a body-less Samurai!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Startling! The Secret of the Island Is Finally Revealed!

programme.title: Nami's soft spot for children prompts her to call off the escape and declare war on anyone who makes a kid cry. Meanwhile, Luffy and the gang take a banana boat to the icy side of the island!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Save the Children! The Straw Hats Start to Fight!

programme.title: Luffy's group finds themselves up against a gang of centaurs, Brook battles the torso of a surly samurai, and Captain Smoker encounters someone highly unexpected!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Swordplay Showdown! Brook vs. the Mysterious Torso Samurai!

programme.title: Nami and Chopper seek a safe exit for the children, Luffy's group hopes to avoid a perilous plunge into icy waters, and Captain Smoker faces off against Trafalgar Law!
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Luffy's group takes a deadly plunge into icy waters, and Trafalgar Law uses his unique abilities to rearrange Nami's group and cast our heroes into chaotic confusion!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: In a Real Pinch! Luffy Sinks into the Ice-Cold Lake!

programme.title: While Luffy and his mates race toward a reunion, Admiral Smoker struggles to survive a heart-stopping showdown with Trafalgar Law!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Collision! Law vs. Vice Admiral Smoker!

programme.title: Luffy is excited to once again cross paths with Trafalgar Law, but a reunion with his mixed up crew – and the loss of his extra legs – quickly dampens the captain's enthusiasm!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Meeting Again After Two Years! Luffy and Law!

programme.title: While Captain Smoker determines his next move, a very large pirate with alligator legs tells Luffy and the Straw Hats the true story of Punk Hazard's mysterious transformation!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Worst in the World! A Scientist of Terror - Caesar!

programme.title: In the aftermath of Toriko, Luffy, and Goku's three-way tie in the World's Best Eating Competition, the festivities are interrupted by the sudden appearance of a monster that threatens to consume every living thing on earth.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: History’s Strongest Collaboration vs. Glutton of the Sea

programme.title: The giant children fly into a mysterious rage, and Chopper discovers the true reason for their unusual condition! Meanwhile, Zoro, Brook, and Sanji cross paths with a dangerous duo!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Chopper's Fury! The Master's Inhumane Experiment!

programme.title: The story of how Trafalgar Law arrived at Punk Hazard is revealed, and the Yeti Cool Brothers set their sights on a showdown with the Straw Hats!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: To Annihilate the Straw Hats! Legendary Assassins Descend!

programme.title: Luffy tries to chase down the Yetti Cool Brothers, but Franky – still trapped in Chopper's Body – makes his mission extremely difficult. Just when all appears lost, an unexpected ally lends a hand!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Save Nami! Luffy's Fight on the Snow-Capped Mountains!

programme.title: Luffy agrees to an alliance with Trafalgar Law, but the Straw Hats refuse to leave the island until the children are safe. Meanwhile, the gaseous master unleashes something very deadly!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Formed! Luffy and Law's Pirate Alliance!

programme.title: Zoro, Sanji, and Brook continue their search for the samurai, Trafalgar tries to sneak Chopper into the laboratory, and Luffy boldly challenges the Master!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Capture M! The Pirate Alliance's Operation Launches!

programme.title: Luffy's battle with his old nemesis Smoker is interrupted by the arrival of a terrifying toxic blob – and the evil genius who created the monster!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: On the Verge of Annihilation! A Deadly Monster Comes Flying In!

programme.title: The Straw Hats make a valiant push to capture Caesar Clown - Luffy matches his Armament Haki with Clown's powerful Gas-Gas Fruit powers! The battle turns in favor of the Straw Hats, but underestimating Clown's abilities may have deadly consequences!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: An Intense Battle! Caesar Exercises His True Power!

programme.title: Gladiator, (2000, Blockbusters)
programme.desc: A man robbed of his name and his dignity strives to win them back, and gain the freedom of his people, in this epic historical drama from director Ridley Scott.

programme.title: First Blood, (1982, Action)
programme.desc: A soft-spoken Vietnam vet drifts into a small town looking for no trouble, but finds it in the form of a psychotic local sheriff who finds pleasure in hating him for no reason.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood Part II, (1985, Action)
programme.desc: John Rambo is sent on assignment back to Southeast Asia to uncover evidence of still missing POWs, and ends up with his hands full when he comes up against Vietnamese soldiers still guarding the camps.

programme.title: Rambo III, (1988, Action)
programme.desc: Rambo refuses to join his friend and former mentor, Colonel Trautman, on a mission to Afghanistan. The mission fails and Trautman is captured by Russian troops. Now Rambo must infiltrate the Russian fortress to save his only friend.

programme.title: Cyborg, (1989, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme stars in this adrenaline-charged sci-fi thriller as Gibson Rickenbacker, the future's most fearsome warrior. In the wake of a plague, Rickenbacker must rescue the only person who can develop a vaccine and save civilization.

programme.title: First Blood, (1982, Action)
programme.desc: A soft-spoken Vietnam vet drifts into a small town looking for no trouble, but finds it in the form of a psychotic local sheriff who finds pleasure in hating him for no reason.

programme.title: Rambo III, (1988, Action)

programme.title: First Blood, (1982, Action)
programme.desc: A soft-spoken Vietnam vet drifts into a small town looking for no trouble, but finds it in the form of a psychotic local sheriff who finds pleasure in hating him for no reason.

programme.title: Man of the West, (1958, Drama)
programme.desc: Screen legend Gary Cooper demonstrates why he will always be remembered as one of the most authentic stars of the screen. Capable yet vulnerable, Cooper's portrayal of a former outlaw whose past returns to haunt him ranks among his very best.

programme.title: Along Came Jones, (1945, Drama)
programme.desc: Gary Cooper gives a marvelous, tongue-in-cheek performance as a fumble-fingered cowpoke who is mistaken for a notorious bandit and almost gets killed by both sides of the law...all while managing to capture the attention of Loretta Young.

programme.title: McLintock!, (1963, Drama)
programme.desc: The cattle rancher McLintock (John Wayne) puts his brand on the territory and every woman in it! Louise Warren plays a widow who moves with her two children onto McLintock’s ranch to serve as cook, while Maureen O’Hara plays the estranged wife.

programme.title: Stardust on the Sage, (1942, Drama)
programme.desc: When a radio commentator fakes Gene Autry's voice on her show telling cattlemen to invest their money in a hydraulic mining venture rather than in cattle, Gene must correct the error of her ways.

programme.title: Call Of The Canyon, (1942, Drama)
programme.desc: Gene Autry leads cattlemen in rebellion when a packing company rep cheats them. A gal’s future depends on the company's radio spots for her show! It gets exciting when the owner appears incognito.

programme.title: Flame Of Barbary Coast, (1945, Drama)
programme.desc: A cowboy competes with a gambling tycoon on the Barbary Coast for the hand of a beautiful dance-hall queen.

programme.title: Bad Company, (1972, Drama)
programme.desc: A group of mismatched young robbers attempts to make it as outlaws on the frontier, but their ill-fated heists quickly reveal just how unprepared they are for life in the Wild West.

programme.title: The Gunfighter, (1950, Drama)
programme.desc: A retired gunslinger is forced to strap on his six-shooters once again by the vengeful brothers of a man he killed in self-defense.

programme.title: The Way West, (1967, Drama)
programme.desc: Icons Kirk Douglas, Robert Mitchum and Richard Widmark star in this sumptuous, epic tale of the brave men and women in the U.S. who left the comfort and safety of life in the East for the promise of free land a better life in the untamed West.

programme.title: The Longest Yard, (2005, Comedy)

programme.title: Carga Explosiva 3, (2008)
programme.desc: 2008. Frank Martin é obrigado a conduzir Valentina, a filha de Leonid Vasilev, o chefe da Agência de Proteção Ambiental da Ucrânia, de Marselha a Odessa, além de dois sacos de conteúdo suspeito. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Jason Statham, Robert Knepper, Natalya Rudakova, François Berléand, Jeroen Krabbé, Alex Kobold, David Atrakchi, Yann Sundberg, Eriq Ebouaney, David Kammenos Diretor: Olivier Megaton

programme.title: Justiça a Qualquer Preço, (2007)
programme.desc: 2007. Um hiper vigilante de segurança treina uma jovem substituta e, ao mesmo tempo, rastreia uma garota desaparecida que ele está convencido de estar ligada a um criminoso sexual em liberdade condicional, que ele está investigando. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Richard Gere, Claire Danes, KaDee Strickland, Ray Wise, Russell Sams, Avril Lavigne, Kristina Romero, Dwayne L. Barnes, Matt Schulze, Debrianna Mansin... Diretor: Andrew Lau Wai-Keung, Wai Keung Lau

programme.title: Linha de Ação, (2013)
programme.desc: 2013. O prefeito contrata um ex-policial para investigar quem é o amante de sua esposa. Apesar de suas antigas discordâncias, ele aceita a tarefa, mas logo descobre as reais intenções por trás da investigação encomendada. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Catherine Zeta-Jones, Mark Wahlberg, Russell Crowe Diretor: Allen Hughes

programme.title: O Anjo da Morte, (2012)
programme.desc: 2012. Um policial disfarçado se aproxima de seu inimigo. Ela decide deixar um agente de confiança entrar em campo, mas tem dúvidas se ela tem o que é preciso para completar a missão. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Steven Seagal, Sarah Lind Diretor: Keoni Waxman

programme.title: Perseguição Mortal, (2022)
programme.desc: 2022. O ladrão realiza o roubo de sua vida quando rouba o traficante psicótico, Temple. O plano corre bem até que o ladrão descobre um clandestino em seu carro de fuga: a esposa grávida de Temple, Mia. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Vinnie Jones, Lina Lecompte, James Clayton Diretor: James Clayton

programme.title: Caçadores de Emoção, (1991)
programme.desc: 1991. Johnny Utah, um jovem agente do FBI, se infiltra em círculos de surf para desmascarar uma gangue de ladrões que, como marca registrada, usam máscaras de presidentes dos Estados Unidos durante seus golpes. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: atrick Swayze, Keanu Reeves, Gary Busey, Patrick Swayze, Lori Petty, James Le Gros, John C. McGinley, John Philbin, Bojesse Christopher, Julian Reyes Diretor: Kathryn Bigelow

programme.title: O Suspeito da Rua Arlington, (1999)
programme.desc: 1999. Professor de história faz amizade com seus novos vizinhos, logo após ter salvado o filho deles. Desconfiado de que há algo, começa a achar que seus vizinhos têm um plano para explodir um prédio público e que são, na verdade, terroristas. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Jeff Bridges, Tim Robbins, Joan Cusack, Hope Davis, Robert Gossett, Mason Gamble, Spencer Treat Clark, Stanley Anderson, Viviane Vives, Lee Stringer Diretor: Mark Pellington

programme.title: Centurião, (2010)
programme.desc: 2010. O Império Romano controla do Egito à Espanha, do leste até o Mar Negro. Entretanto ele enfrenta problemas no norte da Grã-Bretanha, devido às táticas de guerrilha usadas por seus inimigos. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Michael Fassbender, Dominic West, Olga Kurylenko Diretor: Neil Marshall

programme.title: Motoqueiro Fantasma: Espírito de Vingança, (2012)
programme.desc: 2012. Nove anos após se transformar no temido Motoqueiro Fantasma, Johnny Blaze se refugia para tentar controlar sua maldição e deixá-la escondida da maioria das pessoas. Ele leva uma vida solitária, até ser obrigado a entrar em ação novamente. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Cage, Elba, Idris, Nicolas Diretor: Mark Neveldine

programme.title: Alvo Duplo, (2012)
programme.desc: 2012. Dois caras durões e pertencentes a lados opostos da lei vão unir forças para dar um ponto final em uma onda de assassinatos brutais, mas a tarefa não será nada fácil e muito sangue vai rolar. Gêneros: Crime Elenco: Cristine Reyes, Dante Rivero, Vic Sotto Diretor: Walter Hill

programme.title: O Guardião, (2010)
programme.desc: 2010. Um policial de Los Angeles voa para o Novo México para trabalhar como guarda-costas para a filha de um poderoso empresário. Quando gangsters a sequestram, ele os procura para resgatá-la e protegê-la. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Steven Seagal, Liezl Carstens, Arron Shiver Diretor: Keoni Waxman

programme.title: Imortais, (2011)
programme.desc: 2011. Teseu é um homem mortal escolhido por Zeus para liderar a luta contra o cruel rei Hiperião, que está causando estragos por toda a Grécia para obter uma arma capaz de destruir a humanidade. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Henry Cavill, Mickey Rourke, Luke Evans, Freida Pinto Diretor: Tarsem Singh

programme.title: Um Colégio muito Maluco, (2010)

programme.title: O Julgamento do Diabo, (2007)

programme.title: Clay, (1998)

Donatello, Raphael e Leonardo ajudam uma vila contra o malvado Lorde Norinaga. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Paige Turco, David Warner, Michelan Sisti Diretor: Michael Pressman

programme.title: Enquanto Houver Esperança, (2020)
programme.desc: 2020. Esta é a história de Angélica, uma garota de 16 anos que está lutando contra um tipo raro de câncer, sua luta para tentar viver uma vida normal e sua esperança de encontrar seu primeiro amor verdadeiro antes que seja tarde demais. Gêneros: Children & Family Elenco: Sean Patrick Flanery, Jason London, Valerie Cruz Diretor: Rudy Luna

programme.title: A Protetora de Animais, (2016)

programme.title: 12 Presentes de Natal, (2015)

Surge então nessa jornada de fé e milagres uma mulher, Maria e um homem, José, escolhidos por de Deus para cuidar daquele que salvaria a humanidade, Jesus. programme.title: Adeus, Borboleta, (1970)

Mas quando a polícia ignora suas suspeitas, Ryan deve decidir o quão longe está disposto a ir para descobrir a verdade. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Donnie Darko, (1970)

O que eles não podiam imaginar é que um dos itens mais complicados da lista se tornaria realidade tão rapidamente. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Um Lobo em Pele de Cordeiro, (1970)

programme.title: O Sabor de Uma Paixão, (1970)

programme.title: Deus Não Está Morto - Uma Luz na Escuridão, (1970)

programme.title: Entre Amigos, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. No Queens, um grupo prepara uma despedida de solteiro para seu amigo de infância, Ray. No entanto, o noivo anda tendo dúvidas e não tem certeza se haverá casamento. Durante a festa, há descobertas para a maioria deles. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Adorável Professora, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma professora reencontra seu antigo aluno, Jason, que sonha em ser autor de teatro. Para ajudá-lo, Linda resolve encenar a peça escrita por ele na escola em que trabalha. A parti daí, ela começa a perceber que sente algo mais por Jason. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: A Química do Amor, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma dedicada cientista, determinada a resolver a guerra dos sexos, arrisca sua própria felicidade para provar que a ciência explica tudo. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Segredos de Guerra, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. No auge da Guerra Fria, um soldado problemático forma um triângulo amoroso proibido com um piloto de caça e sua companheira em uma base da força aérea soviética. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Sombras do Terror, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Adolescente que mora com o avô abusivo tenta proteger o melhor amigo contra os valentões da escola. Ao descobrir uma criatura assassina em seu galpão de ferramentas, ele e o colega bolam um plano de vingança. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Ó Paí, Ó, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Em um animado cortiço do centro histórico do Pelourinho, em Salvador, tudo é compartilhado pelos seus moradores, especialmente a paixão pelo Carnaval e a antipatia pela síndica do prédio, Dona Joana. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: De Volta ao Fundo do Mar, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O pequeno peixe Kevin é apanhado em uma rede e levado para um tanque em um restaurante de Nova York. Agora, ele deve encontrar uma maneira de voltar para casa e reencontrar sua família. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Bons pra Cachorro, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Almôndega e Cassie, dois cães de estimação, precisam superar suas diferenças para evitar que ladrões assaltem a casa dos seus donos. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: O Resgate da Princesa, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Ruslan, um artista sonha em se tornar um cavaleiro, se apaixona por Mila. A felicidade deles não dura muito tempo. Chernomor, o malvado feiticeiro, rouba Mila diante dos olhos de Ruslan para transformar seu poder de amor em seu próprio poder mágico. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Teenagers - As Apimentadas, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O time campeão de animadoras de torcida, de bairro rico, descobre que sua capitã anterior roubou a coreografia de um time concorrente, do centro da cidade. O campeonato está chegando, e elas precisam correr para criar outra coreografia. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Todos os Caminhos Levam a Roma, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Maggie embarca em uma viagem para Itália, com Summer, sua filha adolescente. Mas ao chegar lá, Summer foge roubando o carro da mãe. Maggie contará com a ajuda de um ex-namorado para encontrar a filha. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Um Porto Seguro, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma mulher misteriosa se muda para uma pequena cidade e recomeça sua vida. Apesar da moça estar determinada a não formar laços afetivos na nova cidade, ela não consegue cumprir esse objetivo e acaba levantando questionamentos sobre seu passado. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Apenas Amigos, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Ao visitar sua cidade natal durante o Natal, um executivo fica cara a cara com sua antiga paixão do ensino médio, de quem era o melhor amigo - uma mulher cuja rejeição a ele o transformou em um mulherengo feroz. Gêneros: Drama

Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T03E13

programme.title: 2000. Cartman acha que é muito maduro para sair com Stan, Kyle e Kenny, e decide buscar novos amigos na internet, mas termina se metendo em vários problemas com pedófilos. Enquanto isso, Kenny tenta evitar que seus pais tenham outro filho. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.sub-title: Cartman entra para a ASNAMB (Associação De Sósias Norte-Americanos Do Marlon Brando)
programme.desc: South Park - T04E06

programme.title: 2001. Cartman encontra um carregamento cheio de fetos abortados após o tombamento de um caminhão em um barranco. Em seguida, ele decide entrar para um novo negócio supostamente lucrativo: a venda de fetos mortos. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T05E13

programme.title: 2002. Os rapazes ganham muitos doces em um concurso, mas para conseguir o grande prêmio, precisam do cupom vencedor, que é aquele que ficou com Kenny antes de morrer. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T06E12

programme.title: 2005. Kenny consegue o último videogame portátil da cidade. Porém, ele morre ao chegar no nível 60 do jogo, e vai ao céu, onde fica sabendo que Deus o matou de propósito, já que precisam dele para que salve o céu de um ataque de Satanás. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T09E04

programme.title: 2008. Numa homenagem ao filme de 1981, Heavy Metal, os garotos estão tentando convencer Kenny a largar a última droga da moda que viciou rapidamente os alunos do ensino médio. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T12E03

programme.title: 2009. Kenny leva sua namorada ao show dos Jonas Brothers, mas com segundas intenções. No entanto, durante o show, são distribuídos a todos anéis de pureza, levando os sonhos de Kenny por água abaixo. programme.title: 2010. Cartman quer se tornar um corredor da NASCAR, mas ele acha que não tem condições porque não é "pobre e suficientemente estúpido" para alcançar seus sonhos. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T14E08

programme.title: 2020. Moso, o conselheiro do falecido senhor feudal, e Komei, o estrategista chefe, estão em desacordo. Neji começa a achar que o Guerreiro Amaldiçoado faz parte de um plano… Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Plano Do Tático - T01E163

programme.title: 2020. Komei está controlando o Guerreiro Amaldiçoado. Moso impede as ambições de Komei. A equipe da Folha está incerta sobre os motivos dele. Neji não quer se envolver, mas Naruto se opõe. Gamakichi e Gamatatsu são escolhidos para investigar. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Tarde Demais Para Ajudar - T01E164

programme.title: 2020. Tenten e Neji, sem outra escolha, ouvem Kakashi. Ele sente que eles estão sendo perseguidos. Komei foi declarado um criminoso e condenado à morte. O Guerreiro Amaldiçoado aparece e captura Komei. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Morte De Naruto - T01E165

programme.title: 2020. Sagi jura punir Moso. Naruto se lembra de Sasuke quando vê Sagi. Nem palavras ou Naruto vão impedir que Sagi siga o caminho da vingança. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Quando O Tempo Para - T01E166

programme.title: 2020. Na mansão de Moso, uma batalha acontece entre os Ninjas Errantes e um ninja da Folha. Com a ajuda de Chishima, Naruto escapa do genjutsu de Moso. Moso revela ser o líder dos Ninjas Errantes, Hoki! Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Quando As Garças Batem As Asas
programme.desc: Naruto: Quando As Garças Batem As Asas - T01E167

programme.title: 2020. Choji e Naruto querem muito o ramen especial de Ichiraku, mas descobrem que o restaurante está fechado. Teuchi revela que sua filha foi sequestrada por Ryonin, o Chefe Ninja, que está atrás de suas receitas secretas. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Misture, Estique, Ferva! Cozinhe, Panela De Cobre, Cozinhe!
programme.desc: Naruto: Misture, Estique, Ferva! Cozinhe, Panela De Cobre, Cozinhe! - T01E168

programme.title: 2020. O Demônio do Oceano está lançando o caos no País do Mar. Anko lidera um time com Naruto, Ino e Shino. É revelado que Anko possui uma história inesperada no País do Mar. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Recordações : A Página Perdida - T01E169

programme.title: 2020. Incapaz de encontrar Naruto, Anko fala com os oficiais do País do Mar. O barco levando os fundos do governo que deviam proteger parte no dia seguinte! Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Porta Fechada - T01E170

programme.title: 2020. Assim que acordou, Anko começa a lembrar da Ilha do Demônio, um lugar que ela visitou uma vez com seu sensei, Orochimaru. Anko revela a verdade por trás dos desaparecimentos e do segredo sobre o corpo de Isaribi. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Infiltração : A Armadilha! - T01E171

programme.title: 2020. Amachi e sua gangue começam o ataque contra o navio do governo. Naruto e os outros escapam da Ilha do Demônio, mas o que eles encontram é a frota do País do Mar à beira da aniquilação. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Desespero : Um Coração Partido! - T01E172

programme.title: 2020. Os ninjas da Folha e Amachi se enfrentam no mar. Com a ajuda de Naruto, Amachi é derrotado, mas um monstro aparece. Naruto invoca Gamabunta para derrotá-lo. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Batalha No Mar : O Poder Liberado!
programme.desc: Naruto: Batalha No Mar : O Poder Liberado! - T01E173

programme.title: 2020. Kunijiro visita Tsunade e escolhe Naruto para guiar seu garoto por um dia na vida de um ninja! Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Impossível!Arte Ninja: Jutsu Estilo Dinheiro! - T01E174

programme.title: 2020. Agari Kaisen, um amigo de Tsunade, pede a Naruto, Kiba, e Hinata que procurem um tesouro escondido. Achando ser uma tarefa fácil por terem um mapa, Tsunade ameaça mandá-los de volta à Academia, se falharem. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Caça Ao Tesouro Começa! - T01E175

programme.title: 2020. Depois de escaparem da caverna, Naruto e os outros vão atrás da clã Kedouin para impedir seu plano, mas a Aldeia Oculta da Folha já está sendo atacada. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Corra! Esquive-Se Em Zigue-Zague! Caçar Ou Ser Caçado!
programme.desc: Naruto: Corra! Esquive-Se Em Zigue-Zague! Caçar Ou Ser Caçado! - T01E176

programme.title: 2020. Naruto descobre que Jiraiya está aprontando algo. Jiraiya diz que está ocupado preparando seu manuscrito antes do prazo final. Naruto, impaciente e irritado, escreve seu próprio manuscrito para Jiraiya! Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Por Favor, Senhor Carteiro! - T01E177

programme.title: 2020. A Aldeia Oculta nas Estrelas pede à Aldeia Oculta da Folha para proteger uma estrela. A estrela, na verdade, é um meteorito que caiu 200 anos atrás, e dizem que ela possui poderes misteriosos. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Encontro! Um Menino Com Nome De Estrela
programme.desc: Naruto: Encontro! Um Menino Com Nome De Estrela - T01E178

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e os outros investigam o paradeiro da estrela roubada. O time suspeita alguém da Aldeia Oculta nas Estrelas porque o ninja que roubou a estrela usou a arte ninja da aldeia, Kujaku. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Inesquecível Canção De Ninar - T01E179

programme.title: 2020. Akahoshi, o ninja mascarado que sequestrou Sumaru, pretende usar Sumaru para chamar o ninja misterioso que roubou a estrela. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Jutsu Oculto! O Preço Da Arte Ninja: Kujaku
programme.desc: Naruto: Jutsu Oculto! O Preço Da Arte Ninja: Kujaku - T01E180

programme.title: 2020. O ninja mascarado e Naruto caem nas profundezas do vale. Ao tratar as feridas de Naruto, o ninja mascarado conta o motivo de ter roubado a estrela. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Hoshikage : A Verdade Enterrada - T01E181

programme.title: 2020. O corpo de Natsuhi é afetado pelos efeitos da estrela. Ela controla a estrela e confronta Akahoshi desesperadamente, mas Sumaru é levado como refém. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Reunião : O Tempo Restante - T01E182

programme.title: 2020. Sumaru sente a morte da mãe e foge furioso. Naruto é incapaz de pará-lo. Para salvar Sumaru, Hokuto e Mizura arriscam suas vidas para revelar a verdade por trás do treinamento com a estrela. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Estrela Radiante - T01E183

programme.title: 2020. Akamaru é ferido por um shinobi rival de outra nação. O shinobi usou uma habilidade de luta que espalha bactéria pelo corpo do oponente, infectando as capacidades mentais da vítima. Isso faz com que Akamura entre numa fúria incontrolável. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Longo Dia De Kiba - T01E184

programme.title: 2020. Uma misteriosa criatura se anexa a Naruto durante um treinamento na floresta. Tsunade começa a achar que é a criatura lendária chamada Onbaa. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: A Lenda Da Aldeia Da Folha: O Onbaa!
programme.desc: Naruto: A Lenda Da Aldeia Da Folha: O Onbaa! - T01E185

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e Shino recebem uma missão para providenciar segurança durante um funeral da família Kagetsu. Mas, eles logo percebem que a verdadeira missão é ajudar o filho mais velho realizar o estranho testamento do pai. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Risonho Shino - T01E186

programme.title: 2020. Uma fumaça preta e ameaçadora aparece sobre o País dos Vegetais, e de repente, um ninja misterioso ataca Choji e companhia. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Aberto Para Negócios! O Serviço De Mudanças Da Folha
programme.desc: Naruto: Aberto Para Negócios! O Serviço De Mudanças Da Folha - T01E187

programme.title: 2020. Ao interrogar Yurinoshin e Shun, a equipe da Folha aprende sobre a verdadeira identidade de Shun. Ela é a princesa Haruna, a única filha do senhor feudal do País dos Vegetais. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Mistério Dos Mercadores Atingidos - T01E188

programme.title: Bleach - O Filme: Hell Verse

programme.title: The King's Avatar: Pela Glória

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden - T02E67
programme.desc: 2008. Yamato faz uma simulação para avaliar as habilidades e técnicas de luta da equipe Kakashi. Sai abandona Naruto para concluir a missão simulada. Naruto fica uma fera e declara que, se é para ajudar a salvar o Sasuke, ele ficará na mesma equipe que Sai. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Momento De Despertar - T02E68
programme.desc: 2008. O dia para capturar o espião finalmente chega. Yamato assume a aparência de Sasori e espera que o espião apareça. Para a surpresa de todos, o espião era Kabuto. De repente, Orochimaru aparece. A situação muda, e a equipe Kakashi se encontra em risco. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Desespero - T02E69
programme.desc: 2008. Ao enfrentar Orochimaru, Naruto liberta o poder da Raposa de Nove Caudas. Quando Yamato vê a quarta cauda, lembra do que Jiraiya falou. Yamato deveria suprimir o chakra que afetaria o corpo de Naruto. O ninjutsu secreto de Yamato se torna aparente. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Ressonância - T02E70
programme.desc: 2008. Quando a terceira cauda aparece, Naruto só consegue ver Orochimaru. Ele está cego até para seus companheiros de equipe. Sakura é atingida e cai inconsciente. Sai finalmente segue para sua missão secreta. Naruto libera a quarta cauda proibida. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Meu Amigo - T02E71
programme.desc: 2008. Naruto perde a consciência e é tomado por impulsos destrutivos. Os clones de Sai e Yamato testemunham uma batalha horrível entre Orochimaru e Naruto. O poder e a aparência de Naruto se tornam demoníacos, como se ele estivesse se transformando na Raposa. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Uma Ameaça Se Aproxima - T02E72
programme.desc: 2008. Naruto, mesmo transformado, não desiste de trazer Sasuke para casa. Sakura é ferida por Naruto, mas consegue usar seu ninjutsu para conter a agitação da Raposa de Nove Caudas. Orochimaru tenta deixar o campo de batalha, mas é confrontado por Sai. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Invasão Da Akatsuki - T02E73
programme.desc: 2008. Orochimaru aceita levar Sai para o esconderijo. Yamato consegue parar a agitação de Naruto, mas os ferimentos de Naruto são graves. Quando ele volta a si, Yamato revela a ele e Sakura que Sai foi embora e que Danzo pode estar conspirando algo terrível. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Sob O Céu Estrelado - T02E74
programme.desc: 2008. Naruto e sakura ficam chocados quando descobrem que Danzo planeja trabalhar com Orochimaru. A equipe Dakashi é forçada a fazer uma pausa. Orochimaru percebe que está sendo seguido pelo clone de Yamato e decide usar Sai para despistar seus perseguidores. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Oração Do Velho Monge - T02E75
programme.desc: 2008. Naruto fica chocado ao saber que foi o responsável pelos ferimentos de Sakura. Yamato diz que ele irá suprimir o poder da Raposa de Nove Caudas com seu ninjutsu. Sakura pergunta sobre uma história estranha que ela viu no livro de desenhos de Sai. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Próximo Passo - T02E76
programme.desc: 2008. Sai estremece quando encontra Sasuke no esconderijo de Orochimaru. Sai ficará com Orochimaru em troca de algumas informações valiosas, mas ficará sob prisão domiciliar até que possa ser de confiança. Quando fica sozinho, sai e começa a procurar um livro. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Escalada De Prata - T02E77
programme.desc: 2008. A equipe Kakashi consegue achar Sai. Eles começam a interrogá-lo sobre os planos de Danzo, e Sai conta tudo. Sakura descobre, através das atitudes de Sai, alguns pontos fortes em seu subconsciente e assinala para Sai as contradições em seu comportamento. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Julgamento - T02E78
programme.desc: 2008. Kabuto faz um ataque de surpresa na equipe Kakashi para levar Sai de volta. Com as informações que conseguem através de Kabuto, capturado, a procura por Sasuke está perto do fim. Naruto e Sakura correm para achar Sasuke. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Un Grito Interrompido - T02E79
programme.desc: 2008. Naruto procura por Sasuke. Sai lembra que teve um irmão mais velho e consegue terminar o retrato inacabado. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Últimas Palavras - T02E80
programme.desc: 2008. A equipe Kakashi fica chocada ao saber que a missão verdadeira de Sai é matar Sasuke. Sai alcança Sasuke - deve matá-lo ou salvá-lo? programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Notícias Tristes - T02E81
programme.desc: 2008. A equipe Kakashi tem seu desejo atendido ao reencontrar Sasuke, mas Sasuke não mudou. Seu objetivo é se vingar de seu irmão mais velho, Itachi. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Equipe Dez - T02E82
programme.desc: 2008. O desejo de Sasuke por vingança continua firme. Naruto fica chateado quando percebe que fracassou mais uma vez em levar Sasuke para casa. Orochimaru tem mais ou menos seis meses até sua transferência. A equipe Kakashi faz uma nova promessa. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Alvo Na Mira! - T02E83

programme.title: Geostorm
programme.desc: When the satellites designed to control the global climate start to attack Earth, its a race to uncover the real threat before a worldwide Geostorm wipes out everything and everyone. Starring Gerard Butler, Jim Sturgess, Abbie Cornish.

programme.title: London Has Fallen
programme.desc: In London for the Prime Ministers funeral, Mike Banning is caught up in a plot to assassinate all the attending world leaders. Starring Gerard Butler, Aaron Eckhart, Morgan Freeman.

programme.title: No Mans Land
programme.desc: The YPJ prepares to launch an attack on a camp where ISIS holds the kidnapped women; Ellie discovers the consequences of living under ISIS rules.

programme.title: No Mans Land
programme.desc: Nasser carries out his plan to escape the Islamic State; Nisrin leaves the YPJ in a desperate attempt to find her mother by herself.

programme.title: The Other Half
programme.desc: A woman with bipolar disorder and a grief-stricken man struggle to forge a simpler life. Starring Tom Cullen, Tatiana Maslany, Suzanne Clement.

programme.title: Born to Be Blue
programme.desc: In the late 1960s, jazz trumpeter Chet Baker (Ethan Hawke) begins a romance with an actress (Carmen Ejogo) while trying to stage a musical comeback. Starring Ethan Hawke, Carmen Ejogo, Callum Keith Rennie.

programme.title: Take This Waltz
programme.desc: A young woman (Michelle Williams) is torn between the husband (Seth Rogen) that she loves and a new man (Luke Kirby) in her life, whom shes unable to ignore. Starring Michelle Williams, Seth Rogen, Luke Kirby.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Dr. Helen Magnus fights to save the life of one of the Sanctuarys research scientists who is attacked by a seemingly docile Abnormal; baffled by the creatures behavior, Henry tries to see what, or who, caused the Abnormal to react so violently.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Will goes up against the heads of the Sanctuary Network to defend Magnus who is charged with murder; as the evidence stacks up against her, even Will has trouble finding a way to convincingly defend her innocence.

programme.title: Tia and Piujuq
programme.desc: A 10-year-old Syrian refugee living in Montreal finds a magic portal leading to the Arctic. Starring Tia Bshara, Madeline Ivalu, Nuvvija Tulugarjuk.

programme.title: Muppets From Space
programme.desc: After learning about his origins, Gonzo must decide whether to seek his own kind or stay with friends. Starring Jeffrey Tambor, F. Murray Abraham, Rob Schneider.

programme.title: Ice Castles
programme.desc: A figure skater searches for inner strength after a tragic accident jeopardizes her future. Starring Taylor Firth, Rob Mayes, Henry Czerny.

programme.title: Still Mine
programme.desc: A farmer fights back when local authorities hamper his efforts to build a cottage for his dementia-stricken wife. Starring James Cromwell, Geneviève Bujold, Campbell Scott.

programme.title: The Great Gatsby
programme.desc: A writer (Tobey Maguire) gets swept up in the affairs of Jazz Age New Yorks wealthy elite when he moves next-door to a mysterious millionaire (Leonardo DiCaprio) who throws lavish parties and pines for an unattainable woman (Carey Mulligan). Starring Leonardo DiCaprio, Tobey Maguire, Carey Mulligan.

programme.title: The Age of Innocence
programme.desc: An upper-class lawyer (Daniel Day-Lewis) falls in love with his fiancees (Winona Ryder) freethinking cousin (Michelle Pfeiffer) in the 1870s New York. Starring Daniel Day-Lewis, Michelle Pfeiffer, Winona Ryder.

programme.title: Robin Hood: Prince of Thieves
programme.desc: The archer and his Moorish companion join Sherwood Forest outlaws to fight against the sheriff of Nottingham, who desires to possess Maid Marian. Starring Kevin Costner, Morgan Freeman, Mary Elizabeth Mastrantonio.

programme.title: Angel Has Fallen
programme.desc: Wrongfully accused of trying to kill the president, framed Secret Service agent Mike Banning must evade the FBI and his own agency to uncover the truth and save the country from imminent danger. Starring Gerard Butler, Morgan Freeman, Frederick Schmidt.

programme.title: No Mans Land
programme.desc: Sarya sacrifices everything to help Nisrin and free the kidnapped women; as ISIS searches for a traitor, the noose tightens around Nassers neck.

programme.title: No Mans Land
programme.desc: Sarya and her comrades prepare to attack the Sabaya camp, but the wrong timing might lead to a catastrophe.

programme.title: Come to Daddy
programme.desc: A privileged man-child arrives at the beautiful and remote coastal cabin of his estranged father, whom he hasnt seen in 30 years. He quickly discovers that not only is his dad a jerk, he also has a shady past that is rushing to catch up with him. Starring Elijah Wood, Stephen McHattie, Martin Donovan.

programme.title: Tom at the Farm
programme.desc: A young man (Xavier Dolan) travels to an isolated farm for his lovers funeral where hes quickly drawn into a twisted, sexually charged game by his lovers aggressive brother (Pierre-Yves Cardinal). Starring Xavier Dolan, Pierre-Yves Cardinal, Lise Roy.

programme.title: Maliglutit
programme.desc: In 1913 in the Canadian Arctic, Kuanana returns from hunting to find his wife and daughter kidnapped and sets of to find the men who did it. Starring Benjamin Kunuk, Karen Ivalu, Jonah Qunaq.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: While transporting a usually docile Abnormal, Magnuss helicopter crashes, leaving her and Will stranded in the shaft of an abandoned oil rig; they soon find they are not alone in the water.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: While an old friend of Magnus, a pouched abnormal named Jimmy, is handing over a fire elemental to the Sanctuary team, they are attacked by a gang of criminal abnormals from Chicago; the situation presents a lot of mysteries to be solved quickly.

programme.title: Eve and the Fire Horse
programme.desc: A 9-year-old Chinese girl (Phoebe Jojo Kut) and her older sister (Hollie Lo) embrace their experiences at a Roman Catholic Sunday school. Starring Phoebe Jojo Kut, Hollie Lo, Vivian Wu.

programme.title: Air Bud
programme.desc: Abandoned by a disagreeable clown (Michael Jeter), a golden retriever with a knack for basketball befriends a lonely boy (Kevin Zegers). Starring Michael Jeter, Kevin Zegers, Wendy Makkena.

programme.title: 50 First Dates
programme.desc: Henry Roth is a man afraid of commitment up until he meets the beautiful Lucy. They hit it off and Henry think hes finally found the girl of his dreams, until he discovers she has short-term memory loss and forgets him the next day. Starring Adam Sandler, Drew Barrymore, Rob Schneider.

programme.title: Percy
programme.desc: Third-generation farmer Percy Schmeiser joins forces with up-and-coming attorney Jackson Weaver and environmental activist Rebecca Salcau to fight a monumental legal battle against a corporate giant. Starring Christopher Walken, Christina Ricci, Zach Braff.

programme.title: Miltons Secret
programme.desc: A man (Donald Sutherland) teaches his 11-year-old grandson (William Ainscough) how to cope with bickering parents and the neighborhood bully. Starring Donald Sutherland, Michelle Rodriguez, Mia Kirshner.

programme.title: The Next Karate Kid
programme.desc: Mr. Miyagi teaches karate to an angry orphan being bullied at her high school. Starring Hilary Swank, Pat Morita, Michael Ironside.

programme.title: Legally Blonde
programme.desc: A sorority queen (Reese Witherspoon) enrolls in Harvard to prove to her former boyfriend that she has more than good looks. Starring Reese Witherspoon, Luke Wilson, Selma Blair.

programme.title: Legally Blonde 2: Red, White and Blonde
programme.desc: Fired from her firm, a young Boston lawyer (Reese Witherspoon) heads to Washington, D.C., to fight for animal rights. Starring Reese Witherspoon, Sally Field, Regina King.

programme.title: Three Women
programme.desc: Grieving writer Gia decides to write a book about womens desire; she interviews entrepreneur Sloane, homemaker Lina and student Maggie as they overturn their lives.

programme.title: Three Women
programme.desc: Lina flees from a stagnant marriage and a body of pain; she joins a womens group at Doctor Henrys, tries to reconnect with the love of her life, and begins a friendship with Gia.

programme.title: The Act
programme.desc: Doting mother Dee Dee Blanchard and her sweet daughter Gypsy arrive in a new neighborhood, where Gypsy feels lonely due to a barrage of medical issues, but their new neighbors can be nosy, and Dee Dee and Gypsy have secrets to hide.

programme.title: The Act
programme.desc: Dee Dee is on a high since Gypsy will be given the Child of the Year award, which makes Dee Dee feel like Mother of the Year, but before the event Gypsy has a dental emergency that gets the attention of a skeptical doctor who could expose secrets.

programme.title: The Act
programme.desc: Dee Dee makes Gypsy play dress-up for a costume convention, where they each attract charming men who could complicate their insular relationship; Gypsy is starting to question the lies her mother tells her -- especially about how old she really is.

programme.title: The Act
programme.desc: Gypsy is getting older and Dee Dee is forced into new legal maneuvers to keep control of her "little girl," but Dee Dee is limited by her health problems; Gypsy goes to greater lengths than ever to connect with men and experience a sexual awakening.

programme.title: Run This Town
programme.desc: A journalist and a political aide become entangled in a larger-than-life scandal. Starring Ben Platt, Mena Massoud, Nina Dobrev.

programme.title: How She Move
programme.desc: Forced to return to public school after her sisters death, a young dancer (Rutina Wesley) has a rivalry with a classmate (Tre Armstrong) and joins an all-male dance troupe. Starring Rutina Wesley, Tre Armstrong, Dwain Murphy.

programme.title: One Day in the Life of Noah Piugattuk
programme.desc: A government agent tries to get an Inuit man and his children to move to settlement housing. Starring Kim Bodnia, Apayata Kotierk, Benjamin Kunuk.

programme.title: Willy Wonka and the Chocolate Factory
programme.desc: A poor but hopeful boy seeks one of the five coveted golden tickets that will send him on a tour of Willy Wonkas mysterious chocolate factory. Starring Gene Wilder, Jack Albertson, Peter Ostrum.

programme.title: Hook
programme.desc: When Captain James Hook kidnaps his children, an adult Peter Pan must return to Neverland and reclaim his youthful spirit in order to challenge his old enemy. Starring Dustin Hoffman, Robin Williams, Julia Roberts.

programme.title: Spider-Man
programme.desc: Peter Parker (Tobey Maguire) uses his superhuman powers to battle his archenemy, the Green Goblin (Willem Dafoe). Starring Tobey Maguire, Willem Dafoe, Kirsten Dunst.

programme.title: Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: Tormented Peter Parker battles a sinister scientist who uses mechanical tentacles for destructive purposes. Starring Tobey Maguire, Kirsten Dunst, James Franco.

programme.title: Spider-Man 3
programme.desc: Peter Parker undergoes an ominous transformation when his Spider-Man suit turns black and brings out the dark, vengeful side of his personality. Starring Tobey Maguire, Kirsten Dunst, James Franco.

programme.title: Hulk
programme.desc: Bruce Banner, a genetics researcher with a tragic past, suffers an accident that causes him to transform into a raging green monster when he gets angry. Starring Eric Bana, Jennifer Connelly, Sam Elliott.

programme.title: Wonder Woman
programme.desc: After leaving her island for the first time, Wonder Woman discovers her full powers and true destiny while fighting alongside men in a war to end all wars. Starring Gal Gadot, Chris Pine, Connie Nielsen.

programme.title: Man of Steel
programme.desc: Though struggling with the ramifications of his extraordinary origin and abilities, young Clark Kent (Henry Cavill) must become a hero and save those he loves from a dire threat. Starring Henry Cavill, Amy Adams, Michael Shannon.

programme.title: The Death and Life of John F. Donovan
programme.desc: A young actor reminisces about a dead American TV star and the correspondence they shared. Starring Kit Harington, Natalie Portman, Jacob Tremblay.

programme.title: Thats Dancing!
programme.desc: Gene Kelly, Sammy Davis Jr., Mikhail Baryshnikov, Ray Bolger and Liza Minnelli narrate clips, from Busby Berkeley musicals to Michael Jackson performances. Starring Gina Trikonis, Carole DAndrea, Francesca Bellini.

programme.title: Man of a Thousand Faces
programme.desc: Makeup genius and actor Lon Chaney (James Cagney) marries two women (Dorothy Malone, Jane Greer) and stars in silent classics like "The Phantom of the Opera." Starring James Cagney, Dorothy Malone, Jane Greer.

programme.title: Valentino
programme.desc: Reporters hear lurid tales at the funeral of silent-film sex symbol Rudolph Valentino (Rudolf Nureyev). Starring Rudolf Nureyev, Leslie Caron, Michelle Phillips.

programme.title: The Perils of Pauline
programme.desc: Unknown Pearl White (Betty Hutton) becomes "queen of the silent serials," famous as a heroine in distress. Starring Betty Hutton, John Lund, Billy De Wolfe.

programme.title: The Jolson Story
programme.desc: At the turn of the 20th century, young Asa Yoelson decides to go against the wishes of his cantor father and pursue a career in show business. Starring Larry Parks, Evelyn Keyes, William Demarest.

programme.title: Jeanne Eagels
programme.desc: A 1920s dancer/actress (Kim Novak) leaves her jealous lover (Jeff Chandler) for Broadway, Hollywood and alcoholic decline. Starring Kim Novak, Jeff Chandler, Agnes Moorehead.

programme.title: Grand Hotel
programme.desc: A ballerina (Greta Garbo), baron (John Barrymore), stenographer (Joan Crawford), bookkeeper and tycoon check into Berlins Grand Hotel. Starring Greta Garbo, Joan Crawford, John Barrymore.

programme.title: Riptide
programme.desc: The wife (Norma Shearer) of an English lord (Herbert Marshall) has a grounds-for-divorce encounter with a playboy (Robert Montgomery) from her past. Starring Norma Shearer, Robert Montgomery, Herbert Marshall.

programme.title: A Night at the Opera
programme.desc: Groucho, Chico and Harpo go to Italy and bring opera and its patrons down to their level. Starring Groucho Marx, Harpo Marx, Kitty Carlisle Hart.

programme.title: Dark Victory
programme.desc: An heiress (Bette Davis) with only months to live embarks on a social whirl, then marries her doctor (George Brent). Starring Bette Davis, George Brent, Humphrey Bogart.

programme.title: Til We Meet Again
programme.desc: A dying woman (Merle Oberon) and condemned man (George Brent) fall in love on a ship from Hong Kong to San Francisco. Starring Merle Oberon, George Brent, Pat OBrien.

programme.title: The Constant Nymph
programme.desc: A 14-year-old teen adores a promising composer (Charles Boyer), who is quite fond of the girl (Joan Fontaine), but his romance with her older cousin (Alexis Smith) and following marriage create an emotional rivalry that affects the three. Starring Charles Boyer, Joan Fontaine, Alexis Smith.

programme.title: Of Human Bondage
programme.desc: Based on the novel by W. Somerset Maugham. A doctor-artist develops a tragic infatuation with a promiscuous waitress. Starring Eleanor Parker, Paul Henreid, Alexis Smith.

programme.title: Our Vines Have Tender Grapes
programme.desc: A Norwegian farmer (Edward G. Robinson) lovingly raises his daughter (Margaret OBrien) in Benson Junction, Wis. Starring Edward G. Robinson, Margaret OBrien, James Craig.

programme.title: Foul Play
programme.desc: A San Francisco police detective (Chevy Chase) protects a librarian (Goldie Hawn) who knows too much about a plot to kill the pope. Starring Goldie Hawn, Chevy Chase, Burgess Meredith.

programme.title: No Name on the Bullet
programme.desc: Townsfolk know a gunmans (Audie Murphy) going to kill someone, but they dont know who it will be. Starring Audie Murphy, Charles Drake, Joan Evans.

programme.title: The Apartment
programme.desc: A corporate climber (Jack Lemmon), whose boss (Fred MacMurray) and others use his apartment for hanky-panky, aids a young woman (Shirley MacLaine). Starring Jack Lemmon, Shirley MacLaine, Fred MacMurray.

programme.title: The Goodbye Girl
programme.desc: A divorced dancer (Marsha Mason) and her daughter (Quinn Cummings) must room with an off-off-Broadway actor (Richard Dreyfuss). Starring Richard Dreyfuss, Marsha Mason, Quinn Cummings.

programme.title: Alice in Movieland
programme.desc: Alice wins a free trip to Hollywood and dreams about her arrival. Starring Joan Leslie, Nana Bryant, Clara Blandick.

programme.title: The Devil Doll
programme.desc: Paul (Lionel Barrymore) is wrongfully convicted of robbery and murder, and breaks out of prison using a scientists shrinking invention. Starring Lionel Barrymore, Maureen OSullivan, Frank Lawton.

programme.title: Doctor X
programme.desc: A reporter (Lee Tracy) saves a mad doctors (Lionel Atwill) daughter (Fay Wray) from a full-moon killer with synthetic flesh. Starring Lionel Atwill, Fay Wray, Lee Tracy.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: An executed convict returns from the grave to revenge himself against the gangsters who framed him for murder. Starring Boris Karloff, Ricardo Cortez, Edmund Gwenn.

programme.title: Dr. Jekyll and Mr. Hyde
programme.desc: March won an Oscar for his portrayal of the scientist whose experiments bring out a hideous side of his personality. Starring Fredric March, Miriam Hopkins, Rose Hobart.

programme.title: Men Must Fight
programme.desc: The secretary of states (Lewis Stone) wife (Diana Wynyard) and son (Phillips Holmes) oppose a 1940 war, ending with an air raid on New York. Starring Diana Wynyard, Lewis Stone, Phillips Holmes.

programme.title: Things to Come
programme.desc: William Cameron Menzies adaptation of the H.G. Wells novel tells of humankinds efforts to rebuild the war-torn planet. Starring Raymond Massey, Ralph Richardson, Margaretta Scott.

programme.title: Transatlantic Tunnel
programme.desc: An engineer (Richard Dix) leads the building of a trans-Atlantic tunnel linking Britain and the United States. Starring Richard Dix, Leslie Banks, Madge Evans.

programme.title: Non-Stop New York
programme.desc: Gangsters and a detective (John Loder) take an airliner to follow a British chorus girl (Anna Lee) who witnessed a murder. Starring Anna Lee, John Loder, Francis L. Sullivan.

programme.title: The Gunfighter
programme.desc: Upstarts challenge the fastest gun in the West, a haunted man (Gregory Peck) trying to escape his reputation. Starring Gregory Peck, Helen Westcott, Millard Mitchell.

programme.title: Duel in the Sun
programme.desc: Good and bad sons (Joseph Cotten, Gregory Peck) of a Texas cattle baron fight each other, and the railroad, over a dark beauty (Jennifer Jones). Starring Jennifer Jones, Gregory Peck, Joseph Cotten.

programme.title: Shootout
programme.desc: An ex-gunman is torn between his obsession with revenge and his responsibility to a 6-year-old girl and a lonely widow. Starring Gregory Peck, Patricia Quinn, Robert F. Lyons.

programme.title: Billy Two Hats
programme.desc: A bearded Scot (Gregory Peck) robs a bank with a young Indian (Desi Arnaz Jr.), then leaves him with an old ranchers young wife. Starring Gregory Peck, Desi Arnaz, Jack Warden.

programme.title: The Big Country
programme.desc: A former sea captain (Gregory Peck) goes West, woos women (Jean Simmons, Carroll Baker) and joins a fight over water rights. Starring Gregory Peck, Jean Simmons, Carroll Baker.

programme.title: How the West Was Won
programme.desc: The history of 19th-century Western expansion, as seen through the lives of three generations of a pioneer family. Starring Carroll Baker, Lee J. Cobb, Henry Fonda.

programme.title: Tarzan the Magnificent
programme.desc: A clever crook and a romantic triangle complicate Tarzans efforts to bring a wanted criminal to justice. Starring Gordon Scott, Jock Mahoney, Betta St. John.

programme.title: Looney Tunes
programme.desc: Hubie and Bertie are determined: they want to live in the house the cat Claude lives in; they drive Claude so mad that he prefers to sleep outside; now they have the whole house themselves.

programme.title: Bundle of Joy
programme.desc: A salesgirls (Debbie Reynolds) boss (Adolphe Menjou) thinks his son (Eddie Fisher) fathered the baby that she found on a doorstep. Starring Eddie Fisher, Debbie Reynolds, Adolphe Menjou.

programme.title: Paul Robeson: Tribute to an Artist
programme.desc: Filmmaker Saul J. Turell profiles early 20th-century American singer Paul Robeson. Sidney Poitier narrates.

programme.title: The Wind and the Lion
programme.desc: An Arab chieftain (Sean Connery) abducts a U.S. widow (Candice Bergen) and her children; President Theodore Roosevelt (Brian Keith) sends the Marines. Starring Sean Connery, Candice Bergen, Brian Keith.

programme.title: Gandhi
programme.desc: Richard Attenboroughs Oscar-winning portrait of the man whose policy of nonviolence won Indias independence. Starring Ben Kingsley, Rohini Hattangadi, Roshan Seth.

programme.title: Kanal
programme.desc: Polish partisans (Teresa Izewska, Tadeusz Janczar, Wisczyslaw Glinski) hide from the Nazis in the sewers of Warsaw. Starring Teresa Izewska, Tadeusz Janczar, Wisczyslaw Glinski.

programme.title: Salvatore Giuliano
programme.desc: An outlaw goes to work for separatist politicians during the 1940s. Starring Salvo Randone, Bruno Ekmar, Federico Zardi.

programme.title: The Strange Love of Martha Ivers
programme.desc: Young Martha inadvertently causes the death of her cruel, authoritarian aunt. Martha lies to the cops, but fear a childhood friend saw it too. Starring Barbara Stanwyck, Van Heflin, Kirk Douglas.

programme.title: Born to Kill
programme.desc: A private eye (Walter Slezak) hunts a killer (Lawrence Tierney) who marries a divorcees (Claire Trevor) rich sister. Starring Lawrence Tierney, Claire Trevor, Walter Slezak.

programme.title: Fiddlers Journey to the Big Screen
programme.desc: Behind-the-scenes footage, interviews with cast and crew, and never-before-seen stills provide insight into the making of the beloved musical film "Fiddler on the Roof."

programme.desc: The story of Princess Dianas life, including her heartaches and triumphs.

programme.desc: Robins behaviour grows more mysterious when she begins to search a woman called Eva Doyle online.

programme.desc: At the height of WWII, a couple stranded on a remote estate become aware of a Nazi spy hiding among them. Unsure who to trust, they must uncover the spys identity as the outcome of the war hangs precariously in the balance. Starring John Cusack, Jake Abel, Brianna Hildebrand.

programme.title: The Last Thing She Said
programme.desc: A young woman befriends an elderly cleaning lady who works in her corporate office. However, their relationship soon turns uneasy, then dangerous, when she rejects a date request from the womans awkward, middle-aged son. Starring Kylee Bush, Jill Teed, Sarah Christine Smith.

programme.title: American Underdog
programme.desc: The inspirational true story of Kurt Warner, who overcomes years of challenges and setbacks to become a two-time NFL MVP, Super Bowl champion, and Hall of Fame quarterback. Starring Zachary Levi, Anna Paquin, Dennis Quaid.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: Gabby Petitos disappearance captivated the nation. Her social media posts left a trail, but what they uncovered was more troubling than anyone expected.

programme.title: One Way Mirror
programme.desc: Professional soldier Skylar Nemetz claims he has a momentary lapse in gun safety that lead to his wife Danielles tragic death; authorities arent buying that someone with his level of training could accidentally forget to do some basic gun care.

programme.title: One Way Mirror
programme.desc: Police finds a new mother murdered soon after reported missing; they bring her partner and his best friend in to be interrogated about her final night; not every interrogation method works with every suspect, and not every theory proves true.

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: On the outskirts of Nashville, Mich., Rodney Fanchers bullet-ridden body is found in a ditch; the hunt for a killer begins, pulling in police forces from across the state; as the case starts to turn cold, a startling confession emerges.

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: In the small community of Gormania, W.Va., Cathy Ford receives a mysterious phone call and is reported missing that same evening; a burnt car, blood-soaked trailer and a secret a?air all point to the idea that Cathy did not disappear willingly.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: Rachel Sianis life ended in tragedy, with clues pointing to a dark obsession. The investigation unearths secrets of her double life and the dangers within it.

programme.desc: Jeremy Regan believes places like his barber shop are public spaces of hallowed ground, to potentially understand the world better; to prove his theory, Jeremy hits the road, making his way to Ukraine in the midst of war to learn about local barbers.

programme.title: Almost Unsolved Heists
programme.desc: When bank employee Theodore Conrad casually walks off his job carrying hundreds of thousands of dollars in a paper bag, a fifty-two year manhunt ensues; two federal marshals and a father and son duo manage to close the case.

programme.title: Charmed to Death
programme.desc: A single father finally finds a love he can grow old with; but just months after theyve wed, his retirement savings are depleted, and he learns hes only the latest in a string of victims; when he files for divorce, things get much worse.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers
programme.desc: A 40-year-old disappears on the second night of a cruise, her family is left searching for answers, and it ends up changing the way missing persons are reported at sea.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers
programme.desc: A sous chef aboard a cruise ship leaves her shift unexpectedly and is never seen again; the pressure of the kitchen may have pushed her to take her own life, or maybe there was foul play; the clues could help solve the mystery.

programme.title: The Hands That Feed Us
programme.desc: Exploring the challenges of making a living as a modern Canadian farmer; how they sell their food and how little control they have over the process and price; from small scale to massive debt; from farmers markets to supply chain.

programme.title: Mary J. Bliges Family Affair
programme.desc: Tensions rise between Kendra and Ben as they move out of the city and struggle with fertility issues.
